title: acalypha ruiziana
intro: Acalypha ruiziana is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as a type of mallows or calumba plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Acalypha ruiziana include its ability to treat various ailments such as rheumatism, arthritis, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Acalypha ruiziana is typically prepared for herbal use by extracting its roots and leaves, and it can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
